title: refactor: extract admin youtube connector routes
goal: Move read-only Admin YouTube connector routes from server.ts into a dedicated dependency-injected route module without changing behavior.
rollbackOrStopCondition: Stop without merge if same-head required GitHub checks fail, safe artifacts are unavailable, forbidden paths change, raw logs are required, or evidence cannot be refreshed for the current head.
allowedScope: read-only Admin YouTube connector route extraction
doneCriteria: Admin YouTube connector routes are no longer implemented inline in server.ts
route module does not read process.env, import server, create a repository singleton, call global fetch, or access secrets
read-only behavior, auth, strict schema, blocked network state, and safe validation remain covered
existing Admin YouTube connector tests continue to pass
no package, lockfile, real network, OAuth, secret, runtime readiness, production readiness, legal compliance, or YouTube policy compliance claim
securityBoundaries: No DB driver or Google SDK dependency is added.
No real DB connection, migration, contract, workflow, web, or overlay path is changed.
No real YouTube API, OAuth token, token exchange, token refresh, token revocation request, RPC, wallet, or deploy change is used.
No runtime, production, legal, or YouTube policy readiness is claimed.
residualRisks: Public wallet and live session mock truthfulness, runtime repository selection, support numeric identity, and support data fidelity remain future phases.
Real credential provider, OAuth consent, real list calls, quota observation, privacy review, data deletion review, and YouTube policy verification remain future owner-scoped work.
humanConfirmation: AI review is not human approval.
AI review is not GitHub approval review.
This PR does not create owner approval record.
This PR does not create merge authority.
productVerificationCommands: corepack pnpm exec vitest run apps/api/src/p1-api-admin-youtube-connector-routes.test.ts apps/api/src/p1-admin-youtube-live-chat-connector-capability.test.ts apps/api/src/p1-admin-youtube-real-connector-readiness-gate.test.ts apps/api/src/p1-admin-youtube-controlled-canary-preflight.test.ts: pass

packageVerification.verification: No package scripts, runtime dependencies, DB driver dependency, Google SDK dependency, package.json, or pnpm-lock changes are introduced.

apiCompatibilitySummary.statement: Moves read-only Admin YouTube connector routes out of server.ts; route behavior and external public API shape are unchanged.

reviewScope.scope: P1 read-only Admin YouTube connector route extraction and evidence.
reviewScope.riskSummary: Main risk is route parity drift while reducing server.ts route surface; focused tests cover auth, strict schema, safe validation, blocked readiness, and existing admin connector behavior.
reviewScope.verificationOracle: Focused route parity and existing Admin YouTube connector tests, typecheck, lint, full tests, evidence checks, quality self-protection, secret scan, self-tests, and GitHub same-head checks.
